name: Hook Login
description: Auto log out and log in to Hook instances
details:
Automatically uses the email of the current Chrome profile to step through authentication for logging into Hook.
When in Hook, press L to automatically log out and do the process again instantly.

N.B. when you log in to a customer Hook instance, the cursor defaults to the Echo chat, you’ll need to click out of the text area so that you’re not typing for the L key to work!
requirements: Logged in to Google profile (top right of UI), click through “Turn on Sync…” if it shows

name: Metric Rename
description: Renames and activates metrics in the UI
details:
renames all metrics that have the default name into a human readable format. Logic is as follows:
Camel Case
‘_’ turn into ‘ ‘
‘_pct_’ turn into ‘ % ‘
Speed is 1 metric per second (may be delays due to internet latency, this is unavoidable)

name: Custom Field Rename
description: Renames and enables (in customer table) account custom fields
details: these will still need to be enabled in the account view tab

name: Metric Categoriser
description: Auto assigns metrics per product to categories
